name: Digi Wave
explanation: A hybrid digital/analog polyphonic synthesizer with up to eight voices. Each voice plays a selectable single-cycle digital waveform from a bank of eight harmonically-distinct tables (organ, reed, hollow square, piano-ish, buzzy saw, pulse, bell and sync-buzz) built at startup, then runs it through a warm resonant analog-style 4-pole low-pass with its own attack/release contour. A built-in stereo delay/chorus adds the signature shimmer. Controls: Wave select, Cutoff, Resonance, Env Amount, Attack, Release, Delay mix and Level. Digital edge meets analog warmth.
